summary: Solid parsing/aggregation logic with good type safety (explicit interfaces, union types). Workflow correctly structures pipeline (test → aggregate → report). Issues: (1) action refs use v4 but not SHA-pinned (security best practice for supply-chain hardening); (2) Bun installation adds to GITHUB_PATH correctly but script assumes fixtures/ dir exists without creating it—assumes tests populate it, unverified; (3) Bun curl-install adds fragility if curl fails; (4) regex-based XML parser works for common dialects but brittle for edge cases. Well-factored src/ modules (types/parser/aggregate/markdown/cli) with minimal duplication, clear error messages. If test fixtures actually created by test suite (not shown), integration is sound.
